channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 13 insley gardens, 8th June
item.description:
Car has been parked not moved in over a fortnight, parked away from the curb and is causing issues for my elderly neighbour
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Insley Gardens, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on both sides of the road, 8th June
item.description:
Fly tipping on both sides of the road, about half way between Rudgeway Farm and the grain storage place. Lots of full black bin bags
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cursey Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple roadwork barriers and sandbags on their sides for days now maybe weeks they are a trip hazard. I don’t know what they are supposed to be safeguarding as at the moment they are more than a hazard, 8th June
item.description:
Linworth exchange outside the corner shops Lynworth Stores

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Cotswold Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: The growth around the trunks of the trees on the verges & pavements on Battledown Approach are obstructing the pavements, 8th June
item.description:
The growth around the trunks of the trees on the verges & pavements on Battledown Approach are obstructing the pavements. Please can the growth be cut back/removed. The pavements are used by children and parents walking to and from the primary school on Battledown Approach as well as residents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Battledown Approach, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Potholes in road by Cotswold Architectural Products, 8th June
item.description:
This has been reported but closed. Today a poor cyclist went across this uneven road and slipped, almost hitting a vehicle on the other side of the road. This is therefore a hazard to a range of two wheeled and four wheeled vehicles who use this very busy road. We have had to swerve to miss some of the undulations as we are concerned over suspension ad other damage too our car. The road needs fixing as I would hate to read about someone getting injured or dying because of the various holes, the surface needs sorting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School pick up time - nearly hit twice in the last two weeks by trying entry road, 8th June
item.description:
Corner Alma Road and Chapman Way Cars not leaving enough space to be able to saifty entry or leave Chapman way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Chapman Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 8th June
item.description:
I have reported this multiple times and still not been repaired. It is leaving large loose rocks over the road and is just getting bigger and deeper

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jackson Crescent, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The grass on the verge died several years ago and has not grown back. The verge is full of weeds and rather overgrown. Please can the weeds be removed and the grass verge reseeded, 8th June
item.description:
GL52 2PZ: Pittville Circus Road, outside Askham Court, underneath a large horse chestnut tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-16, Pittville Circus Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavement outside our house is eroding, and the adjoining verge is like a mud bath due to parents from the school opposite parking on top of the verge. The pavement is now impossible with the wheelchair and my husband is completely disabled, making it virtually impossible for us to go out. The pavement has not been cleared of leaves through the entire winter and is therefore full of soil and mud making walking on it treacherous and extremely difficult and dangerous. The eroding pavement has now made it so narrow that we can no longer safely walk on it. The verge needs to be tarmac or dealt with in some other way. We have had contractors level it out several times, to no avail as parents from the school park on it again and then it collapses. Please would somebody deal with this as soon as possible. We have reported it several times before and spoken to our local counsellor to no avail., 8th June
item.description:
Outside the drive of Waverley, Battledown Approach, Cheltenham GL52 6RE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battledown Approach, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Drainage opposite Dunalley Primary School blocked - flooding will re-occur., 8th June
item.description:
Despite you closing the previous report of flooding on this road opposite Dunalley Primary School, the drainage remains blocked. At the next case of heavy rain, it is going to flood again. At present there is a large buildup of silt and mud leading into the drain, which means it is very slow to go down - even this morning, a couple hours after the moderate rain, there was still a lot of water sitting on the surface not draining. My concern is that if we have another heavy downpour the road outside the school is going to be severely flooded. Please can you attend to check and clean this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Drive, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Tree is damaged problem

item.description:
